description: The canonical integration surrogate key for the park account.
The original business-recognized identifier of the park property.
The business-recognized name of the park property.
Descriptive text about the park.
City component of the park's physical address.
State or province of the park's physical address.
Postal code of the park's physical address.
Latitude coordinate of the park.
Longitude coordinate of the park.
Total geographic area of the park in acres.
The park's administrative classification.
The numeric identifier of the organizational region to which this park belongs.
The authoritative operational system code from which this park record originates.
The integer park identifier from InfraTrak (DCR-AST-01). Null for parks not yet onboarded (Regions 3 and 4).
The canonical integration surrogate key for the general ledger entry.
The original business-recognized identifier for the GL entry from StateGov Financials.
The fiscal year in which the GL entry was recorded.
The accounting month (1-12) within the fiscal year for this GL entry.
The classification of the GL entry (Expenditure or Revenue).
The monetary value of the GL entry in USD.
The compound account identifier in fund-DIV-division-PRG-program-OBJ-object format.
The fund component of the compound account identifier.
The division component of the compound account identifier.
The program component of the compound account identifier.
The object code classifying the type of expenditure or revenue.
Human-readable description of the fund from the StateGov chart of accounts.
Human-readable description of the division from the StateGov chart of accounts.
Human-readable description of the program from the StateGov chart of accounts.
Human-readable description of the object code from the StateGov chart of accounts.
The StateGov mainframe batch identifier for audit traceability.
Raw pipe-delimited invoice memo from the StateGov batch export. Preserved as-is; unpacking is a mart-layer responsibility.
Derived count of invoice records embedded in the batch_detail_text memo field.
The GrantTrack award identifier. Null for GL entries not funded by a federal grant.
The official federal award number from GrantTrack. Null for non-grant entries.
The total ceiling amount of the federal award. Null for non-grant entries.
The minimum non-federal match percentage required for the award. Null for non-grant entries.
The start date of the award performance period. Null for non-grant entries.
The end date of the award performance period. Null for non-grant entries.
GrantTrack budgeted amount for this award in the GL entry fiscal year. Null for non-grant entries.
GrantTrack recorded actual spending for this award in the GL entry fiscal year. Null for non-grant entries.
The authoritative operational system code for this record (DCR-FIN-01).
